years_with_crohns.evidence: my Crohn's story started about two years ago.

treatment_journey.name: mesalamine
treatment_journey.evidence: Started with something called mesalamine. Didn't do much.

treatment_journey.name: prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Then prednisone which helped with the gut but made me crazy. I mean, seriously aggressive. Almost got into a fight at work. Had to get off that stuff.

treatment_journey.evidence: Now they want to put me on these injection things. Biologics.

reasons.evidence: The cost is insane. Insurance through the union is usually good but they're fighting coverage. Something about needing to fail more medications first.
Heard they suppress your immune system. In construction, always getting cuts, exposed to stuff. Seems risky.
Doc mentioned there's programs to help with medication costs but the paperwork... I'm not good with that stuff.
